name: Endive and Bell Pepper Salad and New England
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons chopped fresh dill or thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the Belgian endive and red bell peppers until tender.
2. In a bowl, whisk together buttermilk, low-fat yogurt, lemon juice, fresh dill (or thyme), Italian parsley, grated onion, and white pepper.
3. Pour the dressing over the sautéed vegetables and mix well.
4. Garnish with chopped dill sprigs or thyme before serving.
